INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph1> { <http://example.org/person1> a foaf:Person; foaf:name 'Jonas Smedegaard'; foaf:based_near <http://example.org/place1>. } };
INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph1> { <http://example.org/person2> a foaf:Person; foaf:name 'Adam Harvey'; foaf:based_near <http://example.org/place2>. } };
INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph1> { <http://example.org/person3> a foaf:Person; foaf:name 'John Breslin'; foaf:based_near <http://example.org/place3>. } };
INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph1> { <http://example.org/person4> a foaf:Person; foaf:name 'Chris Bizer'; foaf:based_near <http://example.org/place4>. } };
INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph1> { <http://example.org/person5> a foaf:Person; foaf:name 'Leo Sauermann'; foaf:based_near <http://example.org/place5>. } };
INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph2> { <http://example.org/person6> a foaf:Person; foaf:name 'Andreas Harth'; foaf:based_near <http://example.org/place6>. } };
INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph2> { <http://example.org/person7> a foaf:Person; foaf:name 'Alexandre Passant'; foaf:based_near <http://example.org/place7>. } };
INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph2> { <http://example.org/person8> a foaf:Person; foaf:name 'Leon Lord'; foaf:based_near <http://example.org/place8>. } };
INSERT DATA { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph2> { <http://example.org/person9> a foaf:Person; foaf:name 'Leon Smith'; foaf:based_near <http://example.org/place9>. } };
SELECT ?name, (sql:GROUP_CONCAT(?near, ' , ')) AS ?locations WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?person a foaf:Person; foaf:name ?name; foaf:based_near ?near. } } GROUP BY ?name LIMIT 10;

SELECT ?name, (sql:GROUP_CONCAT(?near, ' ; ')) AS ?locations WHERE { GRAPH <http://example.org/graph1> { ?person a foaf:Person; foaf:name ?name; foaf:based_near ?near. } } GROUP BY ?name ORDER BY ?name;

SELECT ?name, (sql:GROUP_CONCAT(?near, ' | ')) AS ?locations FROM <http://example.org/graph1> UNION SELECT ?name, (sql:GROUP_CONCAT(?near, ' | ')) AS ?locations FROM <http://example.org/graph2> WHERE { ?person a foaf:Person; foaf:name ?name; foaf:based_near ?near. } GROUP BY ?name;
SELECT ?name, (sql:GROUP_CONCAT(?near, ' , ')) AS ?locations WHERE { SELECT ?name ?near WHERE { GRAPH ?g { ?person a foaf:Person; foaf:name ?name; foaf:based_near ?near. } } } GROUP BY ?name;
